rationale: Educ. Code §21.203 governs teacher employment policies and contract non-renewal evaluations. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: the employment policies adopted by a board of trustees must require a written evaluation of each teacher at annual or more frequent intervals
_note: No conflict: the cited rule concerns teacher contract evaluations, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
